title: 2021-2025 Batch Placements
content: 2021-2025 Batch Placements Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2025 7.18 LPA Mean Salary 6.5 LPA Median Salary 50 LPA Highest Salary by Google 46.38 LPA 2nd Highest Salary by Amazon 29.5 LPA 3rd Highest Salary by Amazon 19.5 LPA 4th Highest Salary by Zscaler 18 LPA 5th Highest Salary by AtomicWork PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT Solan 2021-25 as on 12/05/2026 PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT, SOLAN 2021-25 Branch Total Eligible Participating Students No. of Absolute Offers % of Absolute Offers No. of Total Offers % of Total Offers CSE 248 240 97% 284 115% ECE 4 4 100% 4 100% ECM 10 10 100% 13 130% IT 25 24 96% 28 112% BT/BI 14 10 71% 12 86% CIVIL 11 11 100% 13 118% Total 312 299 96%* 354 113% * Placements for 2025 batch is still going on Key Recruiters: Amazon Nference DrawinBox Click Labs Infosys TT Consultants Cogizant Kony Labs UniMrkt Coviam Technologies Kuliza Wep Digital Edoofa Kwench Wipro Ericsson Nineleaps Yamaha Motor Sol FICO NTT Data ZS Associates Gemalto Decision Point Zscaler Genpact Root Analysis Zycus Grappus RTDS Zyla Healthcare Hackwithinfi Sap labs IDS Infotech Hashdin SRM Contractors Eckovation HCL Stellarix Consultancy Extramarks India Lends The Smart Cube Collagedunia IndiaMart TresVista Ultratech Mountblue Bright Petroleum Growman Research Group Note:- Significant number of students who have opted for higher studies in India and abroad through GATE and other competitive examinations are removed from the list of total eligible students. For any query please write to pankaj.kumar@juit.ac.in
